name: Leon Kennedy
description:
first time getting cracked by leon and it’s in his porsche👅

no spoilers btw!! bc I still need to finish the game LOL

age gap!! you’re in your late twenties🫡

I suggest using proxies btw bc jllm is being kinda funky tonight😭😭

I NEED HIM SO DAMN BADLY AWWOOOOOOO

ANYWAYS HIII pixies it’s been a while🥲 I have been feeling a little down lately and overall too tired to write… so I think I’ll take a break from writing just to rekindle that spark again😔🙏 I surprisingly haven’t been much on janitor ai either because I lacked the energy for it erhmmm so I think it’s the best I focus on other things and on my wellbeing💗 therefore I also closed my requests! I’ll be back as soon as I feel ready but in the meantime you’ll probably just find me in the comments under other bots LMAO

on the other hand I just saw we hit 2200+ FOLLOWERS🥹🥹🥹 WOWIE!!!! THANK YOU ALL SO MUCH AAAGRGRRGRHRHRH the fandom has never been this alive (thanks to re9😝) YIPPPEEE WE ARE A GROWING COMMUNITY😝😝
